issue_context: CI was flaky on macOS due to missing env var for a native lib.

review_signals.author: reviewer-x
review_signals.comment: We should set the var explicitly in the workflow instead of relying on the runner image.
review_signals.suggestion: add `FOO_NATIVE=1` to the macos job env

before_context: The workflow file had no explicit FOO_NATIVE for macos runner.
patch:
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@
-      - run: cargo test
+      - env:
+          FOO_NATIVE: "1"
+        run: cargo test
